alerts.news: Jalen Royals has been promoted to WR2 on the Chiefs depth chart after Hollywood Brown's release. He led the team in targets during OTAs.
alerts.impact: Clear path to targets with Kelce aging. RSP had him as a sleeper and the opportunity just materialized. At minimum bid he's a must-add.

alerts.news: Chargers signed Gus Edwards to a veteran minimum deal. He'll compete for the RB2 role behind J.K. Dobbins.
alerts.impact: Minimal dynasty value — touchdown-dependent RB on a team that doesn't run much. Only relevant if Dobbins gets hurt again.

alerts.news: Daniels threw for 340 yards and 3 TDs in the Pro Bowl Skills Challenge. Scouts noting improved pocket mechanics.
alerts.impact: Already rostered, but the Year 2 leap narrative is building. Extension candidate if his price hasn't spiked yet.

2025.name: Royals, Jalen
2025.news: Promoted to WR2 — see alerts above

2025.name: Burden, Luke
2025.news: Named starter opposite Ja'Marr Chase in minicamp reports

2024.name: Coleman, Keon
2024.news: Dominated OTAs with Josh Allen. Year 2 breakout candidate.

2024.name: Ladd McConkey
2024.news: Named team captain for 2026. Herbert's clear WR1.

generalNews.headline: NFL extends trade deadline to Week 10 starting 2026
generalNews.summary: The league approved an extension of the trade deadline from Week 8 to Week 10, giving teams more time to evaluate their season outlook before making moves.

generalNews.headline: Salary cap projected to increase 8% for 2027
generalNews.summary: The NFLPA projects the 2027 salary cap will rise to approximately $280M, driven by new media rights revenue. This could affect player market values in dynasty formats.

generalNews.headline: Preseason schedule reduced to 2 games for 2026
generalNews.summary: NFL owners voted to reduce the preseason from 3 to 2 games. Starters are expected to see even less preseason action, making camp reports more important for evaluation.

strategicNotes.text: The KC WR room is wide open after Hollywood Brown's release. Jalen Royals and Xavier Worthy are the only credible options — both are undervalued in dynasty.
Three teams in TheLeague have 6+ expiring contracts this year. Watch for fire-sale trades as the auction approaches — buy low on talent they can't afford to re-sign.
RSP sleeper hit rate from the 2024 class is tracking at 35% (5 of 14 identified sleepers became fantasy-relevant starters). The 2025 class has even better value gap data.
